name: Deep Focus Coding
rationale: Lower energy and less lyrical texture usually supports sustained attention
guardrail: Do not imply productivity music works for every listener

name: Workout Push
rationale: Higher energy and popular hooks can help short physical activity sessions
guardrail: Avoid health claims about performance improvement

name: Social Party
rationale: Danceability and bright mood are useful for social listening
guardrail: Keep recommendations about music taste rather than identity

name: Calm Reset
rationale: Soft acoustic or ambient tracks can reduce stimulation for winding down
guardrail: Not a substitute for mental health advice

name: Nostalgia Trip
rationale: Older decade cues and familiar textures support a nostalgic listening goal
guardrail: Avoid assuming age or background from nostalgia requests

name: Road Trip
rationale: Moderate to high energy and broad moods help maintain interest during travel
guardrail: Do not recommend unsafe driving behavior
